roles.title: Controls Engineer
points: Developed the entire Schneider PLC program and HMI UI to operate ECM fan-array systems for commercial HVAC air-handling units.
Aided in the design and development of electrical control panels for standard and custom jobs following UL 508A standards.
Developed and managed customer-facing documentation such as user guides and BACnet PICS.
Implemented and managed BACnet MS/TP communication per ASHRAE and IEEE standards for HVAC systems.
Developed and managed four unique product testers used in Q-PAC's manufacturing process (8 in operation). Served as subject-matter expert for manufacturing-floor support.
Developed standard operating procedures for high-voltage testing following OSHA safety standards.
Aided in the design of a PCB and sensor to track the status of multiple ECM fans by location using minimal I/O.
Provided troubleshooting support to technicians and conducted site visits to support customers applying Q-PAC's fan system.
Developed OEM support for the product by creating effective solutions for product and process-related issues.
Automated process workflow and documentation with Windows Forms applications using VB.NET and C#.
Created and managed flow charts for four unique PLC programs used for internal documentation and training.
Developed 3D-printed and sheet-metal parts for testing to speed up testing and process flow.

roles.title: Mechanical Engineer
points: Worked on the development of fan-array systems for industrial and commercial air-handling units.
Automated product design using the SolidWorks API in Visual Studio; generated .DXF files with sheet-metal punch patterns and bend lines as deliverables.
Helped develop mathematical models used in design automation.
Collaborated with the team to improve workflow processes and reduce lead time for product delivery.
Used SolidWorks sheet metal to design bulkheads for fan-array systems.
Aided in the design of custom orders that could not meet Q-PAC's standard fan-system design.

roles.title: Account Specialist
points: Created sales reports and was responsible for loss prevention using QuickBooks.
Audited job profiles to maintain financial accuracy in QuickBooks.
Regularly created spreadsheets to track the team's current tasks in the office.
Consulted sales representatives on job progress and performance.

roles.title: Mathematics Instructor
points: Instructed and prepared students to succeed in algebra, geometry, trigonometry, and calculus.
Evaluated student performance using customized tests.
Organized and prepared coursework tailored to individual students' needs.
